items.title: Razer’s BlackWidow V4 Pro 75% gaming keyboard with OLED panel, wrist rest, more hits lowest price at $240
items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops Razer’s BlackWidow V4 Pro 75% keyboard with an OLED panel down to $239.99 shipped. This is one of the more premium Razer keyboards you can get your hands on right now, and it typically goes for $300. Today’s deal takes $60 off its usual going rate to land it $10 below its previous all-time low. We’ve seen both the standard V4 and the V4 Pro models go for less, but this V4 Pro 75% unit with an OLED panel has only seen a single notable price drop since its debut and has never been this low. It’s got some neat features that would make it a solid addition to any battlestation, and you can learn more about it in detail below.

items.title: Save $444 and get FREE 007 First Light game code with this Cooler Master NR2 Pro RTX 5070 Mini PC
items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops Cooler Master’s NR2 Pro MINI ITX desktop PC with an RTX 5070 down to $1,799.98 shipped. Don’t forget to clip the on-page coupon to see the discounted price during checkout. This machine typically goes for $2,244, so you’re essentially saving $444 on it today by clipping the on-page coupon. The listing highlighted here also includes a FREE 007 First Light game code worth $70, delivering more value for your money on top of the $444 discount. This is one of the most powerful Mini PCs you can get your hands on right now, featuring a Ryzen 7 7800X3D, 32GB RAM, 2TB SSD, and so on. What makes this deal particularly noteworthy is that Mini-ITX components like compact motherboards, power supplies, and cases often carry a premium over standard ATX hardware. Despite that, this setup is currently undercutting many similarly specced RTX 5070 desktops on the market. Head below for a closer look.

This is regularly a $350 display, which is currently going for $260 directly at Samsung. Amazon currently has it for $250, but Best Buy’s offer beats that by an additional $50 today, marking one of the lowest prices we have tracked for it to date. Only once before today have we seen this display go for less, and it’s now within just $10 of that all-time low. It’s a pretty good option to consider if you’re looking to upgrade from a 1080p monitor and don’t want to spend a ton on your first QHD display. Head below for more details.

items.title: Amazon just brought the price down on the Tesla Universal Wall Connector with J1772 + NACS connectors to $550
items.summary:
Through its official Amazon storefront, Tesla has dropped the price on its popular Universal Wall Connector (type J1772 + NACS) Level 2 EV Charger to $550 shipped, which is coming down to match the price we’re already seeing at Best Buy. This occurrence is following in the same manner that we last saw during Black Friday, when it then fell from $650 to $600 at official retailers, and remained there until now. Today, the price is getting another $50 cut, landing it back at its lowest price on Amazon in over a year, which we expect will be the regular going rate going forward, as it is now at this same price on the Tesla site.
